description: Shrine effect definitions — duration, stat modifiers, and visual effects.

Shrine Type.description: Category of shrine effect (Magic, Booster, Recharge, or None)

Shrine name.description: Display name of the shrine shown to the player

Effect.description: Description of the shrine effect when activated

Arg0.description: Primary parameter for the shrine effect (effect-specific value)

Arg1.description: Secondary parameter for the shrine effect (effect-specific value)

Duration in frames.description: How long the shrine effect lasts in game frames (25 frames = 1 second)

reset time in minutes.description: Minutes before the shrine can be reactivated after use

view name.description: String key for the shrine hover text displayed to the player

niftyphrase.description: Flavor text string key shown when the shrine is activated
